source.body_text_sample:
Skip to content
PROJECTS APPROACH CAREERS CONTACT US
MENU
CAREERS

Buttcon has three locations across Canada and is on its way to becoming a coast-to-coast company. As we continue to grow, there are even more opportunities to become a part of the Buttcon family.  As leaders in the construction industry, we take pride in every job we undertake and have a solid reputation for delivering quality services, focusing on ICI, multi-unit residential, mass timber, modular, and energy retrofit building solutions for clients.

We are looking for highly skilled client-focused individuals that will help us continue to grow even further. We embody our values in everything that we do. Safety. Accountability. Integrity. Quality. Entrepreneurial Spirit. People-Focused. These values create a workplace where all people feel heard, empowered, and accepted. If you share the same values, and this opportunity sounds like a fit for you, we’d like to hear from you today.

Working at Buttcon

Our employees are our partners

In our commitment to build better and be better. This commitment is rooted in our shared values of safety, teamwork, quality, craftsmanship, sustainability…
